_description: Design tokens for the placeholder-text pattern. All values are used in after/styles.css.

placeholder.note: #767676 is precisely at the WCAG 1.4.3 AA floor (4.5:1 requirement, 4.54:1 actual). Use this as the minimum for placeholder text on white backgrounds. Do not go lighter — even one shade lighter (#787878) drops below the threshold.

placeholder-fail.usage: Shown in before/ — do not use for placeholder text on white
placeholder-fail.note: The most common placeholder color failure. Looks 'nicely muted' on a good display but is nearly invisible for low-vision users or in bright conditions.

secondary.usage: Helper text, form description, optional badge

optional-badge.note: 4.84:1 on white — passes AA. Verify separately if used on tinted backgrounds.

primary-text.note: White on #1d4ed8 = 6.70:1 (AA). No wcag field — validator checks against white (1:1); this token is only meaningful against its button background.
